ai.ask.title: Ask Vergeo
ai.ask.subtitle: Ask about products, services, and events on Vergeo5.
ai.ask.inputPlaceholder: e.g. Where can I buy a solar fridge in Lusaka?
ai.ask.emptyHint: Type a question to search across Vergeo5.
ai.ask.networkError: Couldn't reach Ask Vergeo. Check your connection and try again.
ai.quota.remaining: {count, plural, one {# question left} other {# questions left}} this month
ai.disclaimer: AI answers are suggestions — verify before you buy
ai.quota.guestExceeded: You've used your free guest questions. Sign up to keep asking Vergeo.
ai.quota.monthlyExceeded: You've reached your monthly question limit.
ai.quota.killSwitch: Ask Vergeo is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
ai.quota.tooLong: Your question is too long. Please shorten it.
ai.quota.rateLimited: Too many questions too quickly. Please wait a moment.
ai.quota.offTopic: Ask Vergeo can only help with products, services, and events on Vergeo5.
ai.quota.signupPrompt: Sign up for 25 free questions per month.
ai.answer.not_found: I couldn't find that on Vergeo5.
ai.answer.rate_limited: Too many questions — please wait a moment and try again.
ai.answer.unavailable: Ask Vergeo is temporarily unavailable. Please try again shortly.
